title: knema korthalsii subsp. rimosa
intro: Knema korthalsii subsp. rimosa, also known as the Rimosa Nut or Rimosa Knema, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myristicaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine, where its seeds are valued for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Knema korthalsii subsp. rimosa are said to include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, making it a valuable herbal remedy in the region. Herbal preparations of Knema korthalsii subsp. rimosa typically involve drying and grinding the seeds, which can then be consumed as a powder or made into decoctions for medicinal use.
